documents.document: metadata: source_file: TC3_ST-TCM_ChaiLAI_TestCaseAgent_v0.1(Template 4.0) Update_2.xlsx sheet_name: 2.TCM total_test_cases: 5 header_structure: - Requirement ID - Priority - Application ID/Name - Doc Ref - Use Case ID/Function Name - Reviewing Group - Test Scenario/Case ID - Test Scenario/Case Description - Pre-requisite - Link From > Application - Link From > Function - Format File > Excel - Format File > yaml - Format File > Other - Total File Size > <10MB - Total File Size > 10MB - Total File Size > >10MB - Quantity of File > 1 - Quantity of File > >1 - Quantity of File > None - TCM completion > Complete - TCM completion > No mandatoty - TCM completion > No descripion - TCM completion > No mark condition - TCM completion > No record (Blank) test_cases: - _row_index: 6 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00006 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ generate test case กรณีข้อมูลในไฟล์ TCM มีแต่ Test Scenario/Case Description แต่ไม่ได้ mark x ที่ condition เลย Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > No mark condition: true - _row_index: 7 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00007 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ generate test case กรณีข้อมูลในไฟล์ TCM ทำการ mark x ที่ condition แต่ไม่มีข้อมูล Test Scenario/Case Description Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > No descripion: true - _row_index: 8 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00008 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ generate test case กรณีข้อมูลในไฟล์ TCM แสดงข้อมูลครบถ้วน ยกเว้น Application ID/Name ที่เป็น Mandatory Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > No mandatoty: true - _row_index: 9 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00009 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ generate test case กรณีแนบไฟล์ TCM ตาม template ที่กำหนด โดยมี file tpye และ size ถูกต้องตามเงื่อนไข และข้อมูลในไฟล์ TCM แสดงข้อมูลครบถ้วน Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > Complete: true - _row_index: 10 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00010 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการพิมพ์ prompt ในไฉไล กรณีสั่งให้สร้าง Test case จาก TCM แต่ไม่ได้แนบไฟล์ Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > None: true

metadata: source_file: TC3_ST-TCM_ChaiLAI_TestCaseAgent_v0.1(Template 4.0) Update_1.xlsx sheet_name: 2.TCM total_test_cases: 5 header_structure: - Requirement ID - Priority - Application ID/Name - Doc Ref - Use Case ID/Function Name - Reviewing Group - Test Scenario/Case ID - Test Scenario/Case Description - Pre-requisite - Link From > Application - Link From > Function - Format File > Excel - Format File > yaml - Format File > Other - Total File Size > <10MB - Total File Size > 10MB - Total File Size > >10MB - Quantity of File > 1 - Quantity of File > >1 - Quantity of File > None - TCM completion > Complete - TCM completion > No mandatoty - TCM completion > No descripion - TCM completion > No mark condition - TCM completion > No record (Blank) test_cases: - _row_index: 6 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00001 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ upload TCM Template file ที่มี 1 ไฟล์ และขนาดไม่เกิน 10MB Pre-requisite: '- TCM Template (.xls and .xlsx)
- only 1 file
- size not over 10MB' Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Total File Size > 10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > Complete: true - _row_index: 7 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00002 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ upload TCM Template file ที่มี 1 ไฟล์ แต่เกิน 10MB Pre-requisite: '- TCM Template (.xls or .xlsx)
- only 1 file
- size more than 10MB' Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > >10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > Complete: true - _row_index: 8 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00003 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ upload TCM Template file มากกว่า 1 ไฟล์ และขนาดไม่เกิน 10MB Pre-requisite: '- TCM Template (.xls or .xlsx)
- TCM Template more than 1 file
- total size not over 10MB' Format File > Excel: true Format File > yaml: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Total File Size > 10MB: true Quantity of File > >1: true TCM completion > Complete: true - _row_index: 9 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00004 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ upload TCM Template file มากกว่า 1 ไฟล์ แต่ละไฟล์ไม่เกิน 10MB แต่เมื่อรวมกันแล้วเกิน 10MB Pre-requisite: '- TCM Template (.xls or .xlsx) 1 file
- other file (txt, yaml)
- total size more than 10MB' Format File > Excel: true Format File > yaml: true Total File Size > >10MB: true Quantity of File > >1: true TCM completion > Complete: true - _row_index: 10 Application ID/Name: 698.15 - Chai LAI Test Scenario/Case ID: TS_698.15_TestCaseAgent_00005 Test Scenario/Case Description: ตรวจสอบการ generate test case กรณีข้อมูลในไฟล์ TCM ไม่มี Test Scenario/Case Description เลย (มีแต่ Header) Format File > Excel: true Total File Size > <10MB: true Quantity of File > 1: true TCM completion > No record (Blank): true

components: responses: BadRequest: content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' description: Invalid request payload or parameters ErrorResponse: content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' description: Standard error envelope InternalError: content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' description: Unexpected server error NotFound: content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' description: The requested resource was not found schemas: CreateOrderRequest: properties: customer_id: example: cust-001 type: string total: example: 250.0 format: double minimum: 0.01 type: number required: - customer_id - total type: object ErrorResponse: properties: error: example: order with id 99 not found type: string required: - error type: object OrderResponse: description: API response object for an Order. properties: created_at: description: ISO-8601, UTC timestamp of when the order was created. example: '2026-02-01T00:00:00Z' format: date-time type: string customer_id: example: cust-001 type: string estimated_delivery_date: description: ISO-8601, UTC timestamp of the estimated delivery date. Calculated as exactly 3 days after created_at (UTC). example: '2026-02-04T00:00:00Z' format: date-time type: string id: example: 1 type: integer status: enum: - pending - confirmed - shipped - delivered - cancelled example: pending type: string total: example: 250.0 format: double type: number required: - id - customer_id - total - status - created_at - estimated_delivery_date type: object info: description: REST API for managing Orders. title: Simple Go Project – Order API version: 1.0.0 openapi: 3.0.3 paths: /orders: post: operationId: createOrder requestBody: content: application/json: example: customer_id: cust-001 total: 250.0 schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateOrderRequest' required: true responses: '201': content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderResponse' description: Order created successfully '400': $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest' '500': $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalError' summary: Create a new order tags: - orders /orders/{id}: get: operationId: getOrderById parameters: - description: Numeric ID of the order to retrieve in: path name: id required: true schema: type: integer responses: '200': content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderResponse' description: Order found '400': $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest' '404': $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' summary: Get an order by ID tags: - orders servers: - description: v1 prefix for all routes url: api/v1
